title: Delicate Smoky Algerian Veal Ceviche
description: A tangy, aerated, festive Algerian ceviche featuring smoked veal, citrus, and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Slice veal into 2-3mm thick pieces and place in a shallow glass dish.
Sprinkle smoked salt and black pepper over the veal, then drizzle lemon and lime juice, tossing to coat evenly.
Add paprika and smoked paprika, and toss again to distribute the spices.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to cure and infuse smoke flavor.
While the veal marinates, finely mince the red onion and chop the cilantro.
After 30 minutes, remove the veal from the fridge and gently pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil and a splash of cold sparkling water to create a light, aerated emulsion.
Sprinkle the minced onion and cilantro over the veal, then drizzle the aerated oil mixture on top.
Sprinkle a little more smoked salt and pepper to taste before serving.
Serve immediately on chilled plates, garnished with fresh herbs and a wedge of lemon.
